## takumi remove

Remove a package from the workspace

### Synopsis

Remove a tracked package from the workspace. Cleans up runtime environments.
Use --delete to also remove the directory from disk.

```
takumi remove <package> [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --delete   Also delete the cloned directory from disk
  -h, --help     help for remove
```
